In a separate bowl, mix together 2 tablespoons of olive oil, the juice of 1 lemon, 2 tablespoons of minced cilantro, and salt and pepper to taste. Pour the dressing over the shrimp and avocado and top with more minced cilantro. Serve over a bed of lettuce or as a delicious side dish. +++
